form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished seventh over 390m at Shepparton, beaten 6 lengths. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last three starts, most recently over 390m at Ballarat. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when seventh (26.03) at Shepparton in a Mix 6/7. Will jump from box 3 for the first time. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Last start winner (24.26) at this track in a T3 RSTW and will jump from box 4 for the first time. Has the ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 425m. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last over 515m at Sandown beaten 11 lengths (30.31) behind Repeat The Same in a Mix 6/7 on March 5. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.2 lengths at Warrnambool over 390m (22.57) beating Black Hawk in Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6. Can make it two on the bounce.
